items.title: Oronde Gadsden: Joined by Njoku
items.body_text: Gadsden faces increased competition for snaps and targets in 2026 after free agent David Njoku agreed to a one-year deal with the Chargers on Monday, Ian Rapoport of NFL Network reports. Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.

items.title: David Njoku: Lands one-year deal with Chargers
items.body_text: Njoku agreed Monday with the Chargers on a one-year deal worth up to $8 million, Ian Rapoport of NFL Network reports. Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.
